phase: FineWeb Multi-Layer NLA — Stage 0 extraction + parity gate
host: vast.ai H200 instance (C.42301536); 141 GB VRAM, ~250 GB system RAM

stage0_extract.sidecar_note: full §12.6 run manifest (commit, tokenizer hash, package versions incl. pinned transformers) is captured ON THE HOST in the sidecar above, not duplicated here

verify_center_parity.note: center tap is bitwise-identical to legacy single-layer layer-24 extraction (plan §12.5 step 1). Every downstream FVE rides on the real layer-24 vector.

headroom_probe.reason: deferred by operator until after higher-priority training runs
headroom_probe.gate0: H_unique = 1 - max(FVE_delta_ridge, FVE_delta_mlp) on dev; STOP/pivot iff H_unique < 0.05 (plan §5.1, §13)

optimization_headroom: raise batch_size (24 -> 96+ at max_length 1024; size for worst-case all-max-length batch)
add length-bucketed batching to MultiLayerHFExtractor to kill padding waste (~1.5-3x, correctness-preserving)
multi-GPU shard wrapper (keyed RNG already makes disjoint --corpus-start slices bit-reproducible) for the eventual 100k corpus

notes: RAW vectors stored (norm=none); sqrt(d)-normalization is applied only downstream in the headroom probe (FVE) and later as AR target.
299,755 patches = 30000 docs - 13 skipped, minus a small deficit from 33 short-sampled docs (<10 valid positions each).
This phase makes NO safety / faithfulness / mechanism claims (plan §15); it is architecture validation on passive FineWeb activations.
